content:
Mark
Now, I’m Limited?—

Enrique
Ah, we’re all limited

Chris
It wasn’t a sleight.

Mark
I don’t wanna hear it. My inbox is closed down. I am no longer receiving any mail at this time.

Enrique
One of those out of the ‘office emails.’

Hunter
(to Enrique)
I reckon you’re familiar with those.

Enrique
Except now I’m the one out of the office.

Dan
You and everyone else.

Enrique
I’m out out.

Hunter
How do you mean?

Chris
How do you mean?

Dan
WHAT—it’s what...do you mean?

Hunter
It could be how.
context: From document: God‘s Ears (First Draft) — chunk 3 (chunk 3/3)
